_comment: AeroProc Data Version Registry. Update this file every time a data source is refreshed. Filenames in the code NEVER change — only this manifest needs updating.

airports.csv.description: Global airport database (~85,000 entries). Used for Tier 1 (major), Tier 2 (regional), and Tier 3 (heliport) markers, filtered to 300NM from SBGR.
airports.csv.update_frequency: Monthly — re-download from source URL and replace this file.

navaids_aip.json.source_document: AIP Brasil ENR 4.1 — Radio Navigation Aids (VOR, DME, NDB)
navaids_aip.json.description: Official Brazilian NAVAID database extracted from AIP Brasil ENR 4.1 (Apr 2026). Contains VOR, VOR/DME, DVOR/DME, DME, and NDB entries with precise coordinates. Filtered to 300NM from SBGR. Generated by convert_navaids.js from the Tabula-extracted CSV.
navaids_aip.json.update_frequency: Every AIRAC cycle (28 days) — re-download ENR 4.1 PDF from AIP Brasil, extract with Tabula, run convert_navaids.js

navaids.csv.description: FALLBACK — Global NAVAID database from OurAirports. Less accurate than AIP Brasil official data. Superseded by navaids_aip.json for Brazilian NAVAIDs within 300NM. Kept as a fallback reference only.
navaids.csv.status: FALLBACK — navaids_aip.json is the preferred source

runways.csv.description: Global runway data including heading, length, and surface type. Not yet integrated into the app. Reserved for future runway rendering.

airport-frequencies.csv.description: Radio frequencies (ATIS, Ground, Tower, Approach, etc.) for all aerodromes. Not yet integrated. Reserved for a future Frequencies information panel.

airport-comments.csv.description: User-submitted pilot comments from OurAirports community. Low priority for ATC training use. Kept for potential future reference.

countries.csv.description: ISO country codes and names. Not yet integrated. Kept for potential future international route filtering.

regions.csv.description: ISO region codes (e.g. BR-SP). Not yet integrated. Kept for potential future regional filtering.

waypoint_aisweb.xlsx.description: Official Brazilian RNAV fixes database from DECEA AISWEB. This is the most time-sensitive file — it follows the 28-day AIRAC cycle. Filtered to 300NM from SBGR.
waypoint_aisweb.xlsx.update_frequency: CRITICAL — Every 28 days (AIRAC cycle). Set a calendar reminder!

ICAO_Airlines.txt.description: ICAO airline callsign, country, and name database. Used by the Callsign search panel.

ICAO_Aircraft.txt.description: ICAO aircraft type codes and Wake Turbulence Category (WTC) database. Used by the Callsign search panel.

ICAO_Airports.txt.description: LEGACY — ICAO airport list with names only (NO coordinates). Superseded by airports.csv from OurAirports. Kept for historical reference only. NOT used by the app.
ICAO_Airports.txt.update_frequency: None — do not update. Consider deleting.

aerodrome_chart_folders._comment: Each subfolder below contains official instrument approach, departure, and aerodrome charts for the respective airport. Charts are in PDF format sourced from AISWEB DECEA or CGNA.
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBGR: Guarulhos Int'l — Arrival, Departure, Approach, and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBSP: Congonhas — Arrival, Departure, Approach, and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBKP: Viracopos — Arrival, Departure, Approach, and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBSJ: São José dos Campos — Approach and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBMT: Campo de Marte — Approach and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBJH: Catarina (São Roque) — Approach and Aerodrome charts
aerodrome_chart_folders.SBXP: Sorocaba Executive (SBXP) — Approach and Aerodrome charts
